overall.description: First-person exploration of a medieval arena dungeon in a video game. The player character walks through torch-lit stone corridors and halls, examining a wooden cage and approaching various NPCs including a team champion and an armored character named Owyn.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with red tapestries leading to arena undercroft

events.description: exits narrow corridor into larger torch-lit hall

agents.ego_description: walking through stone corridor with red tapestries toward the main hall

entered.detail: large wooden poster with 'ARENA' text and warrior illustration mounted on stone wall
rough-hewn stone brick walls of the corridor
stone archway at the end of the corridor leading to the main hall
red decorative banner hanging on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The player begins facing an Arena poster on a stone wall in a narrow corridor. Walking forward through the passage lined with red tapestries, the camera approaches a stone archway at the end, transitioning from the tight corridor into a larger space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main undercroft hall with stone pillars and blood-stained cobblestone floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall examining the wooden cage structure and surroundings

notable_agents.action: NPC in orange tunic walking through the hall in the distance

entered.detail: large square stone pillar supporting the wooden ceiling beams
lit torch sconce mounted on the stone wall providing warm light
dark red blood stains splattered across the cobblestone floor
large wooden structure with metal bars resembling a fighting cage or cell

segments.scene_description: Entering the main undercroft hall, the player moves through a space supported by large stone pillars and lit by wall torches. The floor is stained with blood, and a large wooden cage structure becomes visible to the right. An NPC in an orange tunic walks in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden cage structure with metal bars for containing combatants

events.description: camera tilts down to look inside the cage interior through the metal bars

agents.ego_description: examining the wooden cage structure and looking down through the metal bars into the interior

notable_agents.action: NPC Agrius the Bold standing near the cage wearing armor

entered.detail: vertical iron bars forming the cage enclosure
empty stone floor visible inside the cage structure
thick wooden support beam of the cage frame

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the wooden cage structure, moving close to examine the metal bars and wooden frame. The camera tilts down to peer inside the empty cage interior. An NPC named Agrius stands nearby in armor.

scene_state.functional_zone: side room with resting NPCs and fallen champion

events.description: enters small side room with seated NPC resting on bench
approaches fallen Yellow Team Champion lying on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the hall and entering a side room to examine the fallen champion and resting NPCs

notable_agents.action: seated NPC resting on a stone bench against the wall
fallen Yellow Team Champion lying injured on the cobblestone floor

entered.detail: wooden table with items in the corner of the main hall
stone archway leading to a small side room
wooden storage cabinet against the wall of the side room
stone bench where NPCs are seated

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the cage, the player walks through the main hall and enters a small side room through a stone doorway. Inside, a wooden cabinet and stone bench are visible, with an NPC seated and the Yellow Team Champion fallen on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to Owyn by a wooden door

events.description: stops in front of Owyn to initiate conversation

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow corridor to approach the armored character Owyn standing guard by a wooden door

notable_agents.action: Owyn standing in full armor by the wooden door with a weapon rack nearby

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs blocking the corridor end
wooden rack holding swords and weapons near the door
lit wall torch illuminating the corridor near Owyn

segments.scene_description: Exiting the side room, the player walks down a narrow stone corridor toward a wooden door. The armored NPC Owyn stands guard near a weapon rack, and the player stops to face him as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, tapestry-lined corridor into the expansive, torch-lit depths of a medieval arena undercroft. It begins facing an arena poster on a stone wall, moving forward through a tight passage before passing through a stone archway into a larger hall supported by massive pillars. As the camera traverses the blood-stained floor, it veers toward a large wooden cage to examine its metal bars and empty interior while an armored NPC stands nearby. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the cage to enter a small side room containing a wooden cabinet and a fallen champion, before exiting back into the main area. Finally, the movement leads down another narrow stone corridor toward a wooden door, coming to a halt in front of the armored guard Owyn and a nearby weapon rack.
